raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California Senate Republicans delivered letters to the California Public Utilities Commission to address the spike in natural gas prices.",
    "Oversight hearings on high natural gas prices are scheduled for February and March.",
    "Almost 100% of survey participants reported that their natural gas bills had increased steeply in the last few months.",
    "One constituent reported a gas bill increase of over $100 in one month.",
    "Another constituent reported their gas bill increased from $75 to $480 without warning.",
    "A constituent stated their gas bill increased by 1000% since last year.",
    "Higher energy costs have forced families to make tough choices between basic necessities like groceries and heating."
  ]
}
```
